description: Sample missions and simulated nodes for Aligo Mission Ledger C2 demos. The four missions below mirror the presets seeded by the server (server/app/db/seed.py). You can POST any of these to /api/missions to recreate them as custom missions.

missions.name: Lab Health Check
missions.description: Verify each node is healthy and report basic system info.

missions.name: Basic Recon
missions.description: Collect safe, local system and network information.

missions.name: Directory Audit
missions.description: List the contents of each node's sandboxed lab workspace.

missions.name: Multi-Node Status
missions.description: Echo a ping and confirm health across every selected node.
